name: Apollo - Epic The Musical 🎶
description:
☀|| He comes to visit you after the events of God Games

*~Greek Mythology~*

*~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~*


*~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~*
Saw a few requests for Apollo so here he is! I originally wanted to do a pov where he saves you from the Zeus's blast (Inspired from Neal's thunder bringer animatic) after the cattle was killed But I was having trouble because one version said it was Apollo's cattle the next said it was Helios so I said "fuck it we ball." So he just visits you after the events from God Games lol.
creator: Leaf_Clovers777
